summaryEn: An HSK 2 reading titled “The bus to work”.
textZh:
今天的故事叫《坐公共汽车上班》。
早上我起床的时候，已经七点半了。
我觉得有点儿晚，所以很快洗脸，吃早饭。
妈妈问我今天要不要去学校。
我说要去，因为我和小王有一个计划。
我把书放进书包里。
出门以前，我又看了一下手机。
天气不太好，可能会下雨。
如果下雨，我就坐公共汽车。
如果天气好，我就走路过去。
路上人很多，车也很多。
我走得不快，但是心里不着急。
到了学校以后，我给小王打电话。
小王说他还有五分钟到。
我在门口等他。
旁边有一家小店。
店里卖水，也卖面包。
我买了一瓶水。
一共三块钱，不贵。
小王到了以后，我们一起进去。
我们先看了时间，然后开始做事。
开始的时候，我觉得有点儿难。
小王帮我看了看，说问题不大。
他说慢慢来，不要着急。
因为他说得很清楚，所以我很快明白了。
中午我们一起吃饭。
我点了米饭和青菜。
小王点了一碗面。
吃饭的时候，我们聊了很多。
他说最近学习很忙。
我说我也一样。
下午我们又做了一个小时。
事情做完以后，我觉得很舒服。
我发现，很多事情一个人做很慢，两个人做就快一点。
回家的时候，天开始下雨了。
我没有带伞，只好坐车回家。
晚上妈妈问我今天怎么样。
我说今天有点儿累，但是很有意思。
我还说，明天我想早点起床。
妈妈笑了，说这句话她已经听过很多次。
我也笑了。
可是这一次，我真的想试一试。
我没有一直看手机。
我先把今天要做的事情写下来。
写下来以后，心里安静了很多。
我发现，早一点出门不一定很难。
只是晚上要早点睡觉。
中午的时候，我又见到了朋友。
他问我今天有没有迟到。
我说没有，今天我到得很早。
他笑着说：这很好。
晚上回家以后，我把这件小事告诉妈妈。
translation: Today's story is called 'The bus to work'. When I got up in the morning, it was already seven thirty. I was running a little late, so I quickly washed my face and ate breakfast. Mom asked whether I needed to go to school today. I said yes, because Xiao Wang and I had a plan. I put my book into my backpack. Before going out, I looked at my phone again. The weather was not very good; it might rain. If it rains, I will take the bus. If the weather is good, I will walk there. There were many people and many cars on the road. I did not walk fast, but I was not anxious. After arriving at school, I called Xiao Wang. Xiao Wang said he would arrive in five minutes. I waited for him at the door. There was a small shop nearby. The shop sold water and bread. I bought a bottle of water. It was three yuan in total, not expensive. After Xiao Wang arrived, we went in together. We first checked the time, then started working. At the beginning, I felt it was a little difficult. Xiao Wang looked it over for me and said the problem was not big. He said to take it slowly and not worry. Because he explained it clearly, I understood quickly. At noon, we ate together. I ordered rice and vegetables. Xiao Wang ordered a bowl of noodles. While eating, we talked a lot. He said studying had been busy recently. I said I was the same. In the afternoon, we worked for another hour. After finishing the task, I felt comfortable. I realized that many things are slow alone but a little faster with two people. When I went home, it started raining. I did not bring an umbrella, so I had to take a bus home. In the evening, Mom asked how my day was. I said it was a little tiring but very interesting. I also said I wanted to get up earlier tomorrow. Mom laughed and said she had heard that many times. I laughed too. But this time, I really want to try. I did not keep looking at my phone. First I wrote down the things I needed to do today. After writing them down, my mind became much calmer. I found that leaving a little earlier is not necessarily hard. You just have to sleep earlier at night. At noon, I saw my friend again. He asked whether I was late today. I said no; today I arrived very early. He smiled and said: That's good. After going home that evening, I told Mom about this small thing.
translationEn: Today's story is called 'The bus to work'. When I got up in the morning, it was already seven thirty. I was running a little late, so I quickly washed my face and ate breakfast. Mom asked whether I needed to go to school today. I said yes, because Xiao Wang and I had a plan. I put my book into my backpack. Before going out, I looked at my phone again. The weather was not very good; it might rain. If it rains, I will take the bus. If the weather is good, I will walk there. There were many people and many cars on the road. I did not walk fast, but I was not anxious. After arriving at school, I called Xiao Wang. Xiao Wang said he would arrive in five minutes. I waited for him at the door. There was a small shop nearby. The shop sold water and bread. I bought a bottle of water. It was three yuan in total, not expensive. After Xiao Wang arrived, we went in together. We first checked the time, then started working. At the beginning, I felt it was a little difficult. Xiao Wang looked it over for me and said the problem was not big. He said to take it slowly and not worry. Because he explained it clearly, I understood quickly. At noon, we ate together. I ordered rice and vegetables. Xiao Wang ordered a bowl of noodles. While eating, we talked a lot. He said studying had been busy recently. I said I was the same. In the afternoon, we worked for another hour. After finishing the task, I felt comfortable. I realized that many things are slow alone but a little faster with two people. When I went home, it started raining. I did not bring an umbrella, so I had to take a bus home. In the evening, Mom asked how my day was. I said it was a little tiring but very interesting. I also said I wanted to get up earlier tomorrow. Mom laughed and said she had heard that many times. I laughed too. But this time, I really want to try. I did not keep looking at my phone. First I wrote down the things I needed to do today. After writing them down, my mind became much calmer. I found that leaving a little earlier is not necessarily hard. You just have to sleep earlier at night. At noon, I saw my friend again. He asked whether I was late today. I said no; today I arrived very early. He smiled and said: That's good. After going home that evening, I told Mom about this small thing.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 今天的故事叫《坐公共汽车上班》。

sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: When I got up in the morning, it was already seven thirty.

grammar.label: Time frame
grammar.explanationEn: This time phrase follows an action, event, or time expression and sets the time frame for the main clause: “when …”.
grammar.exampleZh: 早上我起床的时候，已经七点半了。
grammar.exampleEn: When I got up in the morning, it was already seven thirty.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我觉得有点儿晚，所以很快洗脸，吃早饭。
sentenceExplanations.en: I was running a little late, so I quickly washed my face and ate breakfast.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 妈妈问我今天要不要去学校。
sentenceExplanations.en: Mom asked whether I needed to go to school today.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: Mom asked whether I needed to go to school today.

grammar.label: Negative instruction
grammar.explanationEn: This form placed before a verb tells someone not to do that action. It is the standard negative form for an instruction or request.
grammar.exampleZh: 妈妈问我今天要不要去学校。
grammar.exampleEn: Mom asked whether I needed to go to school today.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我说要去，因为我和小王有一个计划。

sentenceExplanations.en: I put my book into my backpack.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I put my book into my backpack.

grammar.label: Disposing of an object
grammar.explanationEn: This construction brings a specific object before the verb to emphasize what is done with it and the resulting action or state.
grammar.exampleZh: 我把书放进书包里。
grammar.exampleEn: I put my book into my backpack.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 出门以前，我又看了一下手机。

sentenceExplanations.zh: 如果下雨，我就坐公共汽车。
sentenceExplanations.en: If it rains, I will take the bus.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: If it rains, I will take the bus.

grammar.label: Condition and result
grammar.explanationEn: The first connector introduces a condition; the second marks what happens when that condition is met.
grammar.exampleZh: 如果下雨，我就坐公共汽车。
grammar.exampleEn: If it rains, I will take the bus.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 如果天气好，我就走路过去。
sentenceExplanations.en: If the weather is good, I will walk there.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: If the weather is good, I will walk there.

grammar.explanationEn: The complement marker introduces a phrase that describes the degree or manner of an action. It answers how well, how quickly, or to what extent something is done.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我也笑了。

sentenceExplanations.zh: 可是这一次，我真的想试一试。

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我没有一直看手机。

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我先把今天要做的事情写下来。

sentenceExplanations.zh: 写下来以后，心里安静了很多。

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我发现，早一点出门不一定很难。

sentenceExplanations.zh: 只是晚上要早点睡觉。

summaryEn: An HSK 2 reading titled “Caught a cold”.
textZh:
今天的故事叫《感冒了》。
早上我起床的时候，已经七点半了。
我觉得有点儿晚，所以很快洗脸，吃早饭。
妈妈问我今天要不要去公园。
我说要去，因为我和小张有一个计划。
我把车票放进书包里。
出门以前，我又看了一下手机。
天气不太好，可能会下雨。
如果下雨，我就坐公共汽车。
如果天气好，我就走路过去。
路上人很多，车也很多。
我走得不快，但是心里不着急。
到了公园以后，我给小张打电话。
小张说他还有五分钟到。
我在门口等他。
旁边有一家小店。
店里卖水，也卖面包。
我买了一瓶水。
一共三块钱，不贵。
小张到了以后，我们一起进去。
我们先看了时间，然后开始做事。
开始的时候，我觉得有点儿难。
小张帮我看了看，说问题不大。
他说慢慢来，不要着急。
因为他说得很清楚，所以我很快明白了。
中午我们一起吃饭。
我点了米饭和青菜。
小张点了一碗面。
吃饭的时候，我们聊了很多。
他说最近学习很忙。
我说我也一样。
下午我们又做了一个小时。
事情做完以后，我觉得很舒服。
我发现，很多事情一个人做很慢，两个人做就快一点。
回家的时候，天开始下雨了。
我没有带伞，只好坐车回家。
晚上妈妈问我今天怎么样。
我说今天有点儿累，但是很有意思。
我还说，明天我想早点起床。
妈妈笑了，说这句话她已经听过很多次。
我也笑了。
可是这一次，我真的想试一试。
我先把今天要做的事情写下来。
写下来以后，心里安静了很多。
我发现，早一点出门不一定很难。
只是晚上要早点睡觉。
中午的时候，我又见到了朋友。
他问我今天有没有迟到。
我说没有，今天我到得很早。
他笑着说：这很好。
晚上回家以后，我把这件小事告诉妈妈。
妈妈说，生活就是很多小习惯。
translation: Today's story is called 'Caught a cold'. When I got up in the morning, it was already seven thirty. I was running a little late, so I quickly washed my face and ate breakfast. Mom asked whether I needed to go to the park today. I said yes, because Xiao Zhang and I had a plan. I put the ticket into my backpack. Before going out, I looked at my phone again. The weather was not very good; it might rain. If it rains, I will take the bus. If the weather is good, I will walk there. There were many people and many cars on the road. I did not walk fast, but I was not anxious. After arriving at park, I called Xiao Zhang. Xiao Zhang said he would arrive in five minutes. I waited for him at the door. There was a small shop nearby. The shop sold water and bread. I bought a bottle of water. It was three yuan in total, not expensive. After Xiao Zhang arrived, we went in together. We first checked the time, then started working. At the beginning, I felt it was a little difficult. Xiao Zhang looked it over for me and said the problem was not big. He said to take it slowly and not worry. Because he explained it clearly, I understood quickly. At noon, we ate together. I ordered rice and vegetables. Xiao Zhang ordered a bowl of noodles. While eating, we talked a lot. He said studying had been busy recently. I said I was the same. In the afternoon, we worked for another hour. After finishing the task, I felt comfortable. I realized that many things are slow alone but a little faster with two people. When I went home, it started raining. I did not bring an umbrella, so I had to take a bus home. In the evening, Mom asked how my day was. I said it was a little tiring but very interesting. I also said I wanted to get up earlier tomorrow. Mom laughed and said she had heard that many times. I laughed too. But this time, I really want to try. First I wrote down the things I needed to do today. After writing them down, my mind became much calmer. I found that leaving a little earlier is not necessarily hard. You just have to sleep earlier at night. At noon, I saw my friend again. He asked whether I was late today. I said no; today I arrived very early. He smiled and said: That's good. After going home that evening, I told Mom about this small thing. Mom said life is made of many small habits.

Mom asked whether I needed to go to the park today. I said yes, because Xiao Zhang and I had a plan. I put the ticket into my backpack. Before going out, I looked at my phone again. The weather was not very good; it might rain. If it rains, I will take the bus. If the weather is good, I will walk there. There were many people and many cars on the road. I did not walk fast, but I was not anxious. After arriving at park, I called Xiao Zhang. Xiao Zhang said he would arrive in five minutes. I waited for him at the door. There was a small shop nearby. The shop sold water and bread. I bought a bottle of water. It was three yuan in total, not expensive. After Xiao Zhang arrived, we went in together. We first checked the time, then started working. At the beginning, I felt it was a little difficult. Xiao Zhang looked it over for me and said the problem was not big. He said to take it slowly and not worry. Because he explained it clearly, I understood quickly. At noon, we ate together. I ordered rice and vegetables. Xiao Zhang ordered a bowl of noodles. While eating, we talked a lot. He said studying had been busy recently. I said I was the same. In the afternoon, we worked for another hour. After finishing the task, I felt comfortable. I realized that many things are slow alone but a little faster with two people. When I went home, it started raining. I did not bring an umbrella, so I had to take a bus home. In the evening, Mom asked how my day was. I said it was a little tiring but very interesting. I also said I wanted to get up earlier tomorrow. Mom laughed and said she had heard that many times. I laughed too. But this time, I really want to try. First I wrote down the things I needed to do today. After writing them down, my mind became much calmer. I found that leaving a little earlier is not necessarily hard. You just have to sleep earlier at night. At noon, I saw my friend again. He asked whether I was late today. I said no; today I arrived very early. He smiled and said: That's good. After going home that evening, I told Mom about this small thing. Mom said life is made of many small habits.

grammar.label: Reason and result
grammar.explanationEn: The first connector introduces the reason and the second introduces the result. Together they make the cause-and-effect relationship explicit.
grammar.exampleZh: 因为他说得很清楚，所以我很快明白了。
grammar.exampleEn: Because he explained it clearly, I understood quickly.

grammar.label: Degree complement
grammar.explanationEn: The complement marker introduces a phrase that describes the degree or manner of an action. It answers how well, how quickly, or to what extent something is done.
grammar.exampleZh: 因为他说得很清楚，所以我很快明白了。
grammar.exampleEn: Because he explained it clearly, I understood quickly.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 中午我们一起吃饭。
sentenceExplanations.en: At noon, we ate together.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: At noon, we ate together.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我点了米饭和青菜。
sentenceExplanations.en: I ordered rice and vegetables.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I ordered rice and vegetables.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 小张点了一碗面。
sentenceExplanations.en: Xiao Zhang ordered a bowl of noodles.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: Xiao Zhang ordered a bowl of noodles.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 吃饭的时候，我们聊了很多。
sentenceExplanations.en: While eating, we talked a lot.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: While eating, we talked a lot.

grammar.label: Time frame
grammar.explanationEn: This time phrase follows an action, event, or time expression and sets the time frame for the main clause: “when …”.
grammar.exampleZh: 吃饭的时候，我们聊了很多。
grammar.exampleEn: While eating, we talked a lot.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 他说最近学习很忙。
sentenceExplanations.en: He said studying had been busy recently.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: He said studying had been busy recently.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我说我也一样。
sentenceExplanations.en: I said I was the same.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I said I was the same.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 下午我们又做了一个小时。
sentenceExplanations.en: In the afternoon, we worked for another hour.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: In the afternoon, we worked for another hour.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 事情做完以后，我觉得很舒服。
sentenceExplanations.en: After finishing the task, I felt comfortable.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: After finishing the task, I felt comfortable.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我发现，很多事情一个人做很慢，两个人做就快一点。
sentenceExplanations.en: I realized that many things are slow alone but a little faster with two people.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I realized that many things are slow alone but a little faster with two people.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 回家的时候，天开始下雨了。
sentenceExplanations.en: When I went home, it started raining.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: When I went home, it started raining.

grammar.label: Time frame
grammar.explanationEn: This time phrase follows an action, event, or time expression and sets the time frame for the main clause: “when …”.
grammar.exampleZh: 回家的时候，天开始下雨了。
grammar.exampleEn: When I went home, it started raining.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我没有带伞，只好坐车回家。
sentenceExplanations.en: I did not bring an umbrella, so I had to take a bus home.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I did not bring an umbrella, so I had to take a bus home.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 晚上妈妈问我今天怎么样。
sentenceExplanations.en: In the evening, Mom asked how my day was.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: In the evening, Mom asked how my day was.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我说今天有点儿累，但是很有意思。
sentenceExplanations.en: I said it was a little tiring but very interesting.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I said it was a little tiring but very interesting.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我还说，明天我想早点起床。
sentenceExplanations.en: I also said I wanted to get up earlier tomorrow.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I also said I wanted to get up earlier tomorrow.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 妈妈笑了，说这句话她已经听过很多次。
sentenceExplanations.en: Mom laughed and said she had heard that many times.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: Mom laughed and said she had heard that many times.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我也笑了。
sentenceExplanations.en: I laughed too.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I laughed too.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 可是这一次，我真的想试一试。
sentenceExplanations.en: But this time, I really want to try.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: But this time, I really want to try.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我先把今天要做的事情写下来。
sentenceExplanations.en: First I wrote down the things I needed to do today.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: First I wrote down the things I needed to do today.

grammar.label: Disposing of an object
grammar.explanationEn: This construction brings a specific object before the verb to emphasize what is done with it and the resulting action or state.
grammar.exampleZh: 我先把今天要做的事情写下来。
grammar.exampleEn: First I wrote down the things I needed to do today.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 写下来以后，心里安静了很多。
sentenceExplanations.en: After writing them down, my mind became much calmer.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: After writing them down, my mind became much calmer.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我发现，早一点出门不一定很难。
sentenceExplanations.en: I found that leaving a little earlier is not necessarily hard.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I found that leaving a little earlier is not necessarily hard.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 只是晚上要早点睡觉。
sentenceExplanations.en: You just have to sleep earlier at night.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: You just have to sleep earlier at night.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 中午的时候，我又见到了朋友。
sentenceExplanations.en: At noon, I saw my friend again.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: At noon, I saw my friend again.

grammar.label: Time frame
grammar.explanationEn: This time phrase follows an action, event, or time expression and sets the time frame for the main clause: “when …”.
grammar.exampleZh: 中午的时候，我又见到了朋友。
grammar.exampleEn: At noon, I saw my friend again.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 他问我今天有没有迟到。
sentenceExplanations.en: He asked whether I was late today.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: He asked whether I was late today.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我说没有，今天我到得很早。
sentenceExplanations.en: I said no; today I arrived very early.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I said no; today I arrived very early.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 他笑着说：这很好。
sentenceExplanations.en: He smiled and said: That's good.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: He smiled and said: That's good.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 晚上回家以后，我把这件小事告诉妈妈。
sentenceExplanations.en: After going home that evening, I told Mom about this small thing.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: After going home that evening, I told Mom about this small thing.

grammar.label: Disposing of an object
grammar.explanationEn: This construction brings a specific object before the verb to emphasize what is done with it and the resulting action or state.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 妈妈说，生活就是很多小习惯。
sentenceExplanations.en: Mom said life is made of many small habits.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: Mom said life is made of many small habits.

comprehensionQuestions.answerEn: It mainly discusses caught a cold.
comprehensionQuestions.explanationEn: The title and repeated details point to the central topic.

comprehensionQuestions.questionEn: What is the writer's final thought?
comprehensionQuestions.answer: 妈妈说，生活就是很多小习惯。
comprehensionQuestions.answerEn: Mom said life is made of many small habits.
comprehensionQuestions.explanationEn: The final sentence usually gives the conclusion or reflection.

summaryEn: An HSK 2 reading titled “My first Peking duck”.
textZh:
今天的故事叫《第一次吃北京烤鸭》。
早上我起床的时候，已经七点半了。
我觉得有点儿晚，所以很快洗脸，吃早饭。
妈妈问我今天要不要去图书馆。
我说要去，因为我和安娜有一个计划。
我把雨伞放进书包里。
出门以前，我又看了一下手机。
天气不太好，可能会下雨。
如果下雨，我就坐公共汽车。
如果天气好，我就走路过去。
路上人很多，车也很多。
我走得不快，但是心里不着急。
到了图书馆以后，我给安娜打电话。
安娜说她五分钟后到。
我在门口等她。
旁边有一家小店。
店里卖水，也卖面包。
我买了一瓶水。
一共三块钱，不贵。
安娜到了以后，我们一起进去。
我们先看了时间，然后开始做事。
开始的时候，我觉得有点儿难。
安娜帮我看了看，说问题不大。
她说慢慢来，不要着急。
因为她说得很清楚，所以我很快明白了。
中午我们一起吃饭。
我点了米饭和青菜。
安娜点了一碗面。
吃饭的时候，我们聊了很多。
她说最近学习很忙。
我说我也一样。
下午我们又做了一个小时。
事情做完以后，我觉得很舒服。
我发现，很多事情一个人做很慢，两个人做就快一点。
回家的时候，天开始下雨了。
我没有带伞，只好坐车回家。
晚上妈妈问我今天怎么样。
我说今天有点儿累，但是很有意思。
我还说，明天我想早点起床。
妈妈笑了，说这句话她已经听过很多次。
我也笑了。
可是这一次，我真的想试一试。
写下来以后，心里安静了很多。
我发现，早一点出门不一定很难。
只是晚上要早点睡觉。
中午的时候，我又见到了朋友。
他问我今天有没有迟到。
我说没有，今天我到得很早。
他笑着说：这很好。
晚上回家以后，我把这件小事告诉妈妈。
妈妈说，生活就是很多小习惯。
translation: Today's story is called 'My first Peking duck'. When I got up in the morning, it was already seven thirty. I was running a little late, so I quickly washed my face and ate breakfast. Mom asked whether I needed to go to the library today. I said yes, because Anna and I had a plan. I put the umbrella into my backpack. Before going out, I looked at my phone again. The weather was not very good; it might rain. If it rains, I will take the bus. If the weather is good, I will walk there. There were many people and many cars on the road. I did not walk fast, but I was not anxious. After arriving at library, I called Anna. Anna said she would arrive in five minutes. I waited for her at the entrance. There was a small shop nearby. The shop sold water and bread. I bought a bottle of water. It was three yuan in total, not expensive. After Anna arrived, we went in together. We first checked the time, then started working. At the beginning, I felt it was a little difficult. Anna looked it over for me and said the problem was not big. She said to take it slowly and not worry. Because she explained it clearly, I understood quickly. At noon, we ate together. I ordered rice and vegetables. Anna ordered a bowl of noodles. While eating, we talked a lot. She said she had been busy studying recently. I said I was the same. In the afternoon, we worked for another hour. After finishing the task, I felt comfortable. I realized that many things are slow alone but a little faster with two people. When I went home, it started raining. I did not bring an umbrella, so I had to take a bus home. In the evening, Mom asked how my day was. I said it was a little tiring but very interesting. I also said I wanted to get up earlier tomorrow. Mom laughed and said she had heard that many times. I laughed too. But this time, I really want to try. After writing them down, my mind became much calmer. I found that leaving a little earlier is not necessarily hard. You just have to sleep earlier at night. At noon, I saw my friend again. He asked whether I was late today. I said no; today I arrived very early. He smiled and said: That's good. After going home that evening, I told Mom about this small thing. Mom said life is made of many small habits.

Mom asked whether I needed to go to the library today. I said yes, because Anna and I had a plan. I put the umbrella into my backpack. Before going out, I looked at my phone again. The weather was not very good; it might rain. If it rains, I will take the bus. If the weather is good, I will walk there. There were many people and many cars on the road. I did not walk fast, but I was not anxious. After arriving at library, I called Anna. Anna said she would arrive in five minutes. I waited for her at the entrance. There was a small shop nearby. The shop sold water and bread. I bought a bottle of water. It was three yuan in total, not expensive. After Anna arrived, we went in together. We first checked the time, then started working. At the beginning, I felt it was a little difficult. Anna looked it over for me and said the problem was not big. She said to take it slowly and not worry. Because she explained it clearly, I understood quickly. At noon, we ate together. I ordered rice and vegetables. Anna ordered a bowl of noodles. While eating, we talked a lot. She said she had been busy studying recently. I said I was the same. In the afternoon, we worked for another hour. After finishing the task, I felt comfortable. I realized that many things are slow alone but a little faster with two people. When I went home, it started raining. I did not bring an umbrella, so I had to take a bus home. In the evening, Mom asked how my day was. I said it was a little tiring but very interesting. I also said I wanted to get up earlier tomorrow. Mom laughed and said she had heard that many times. I laughed too. But this time, I really want to try. After writing them down, my mind became much calmer. I found that leaving a little earlier is not necessarily hard. You just have to sleep earlier at night. At noon, I saw my friend again. He asked whether I was late today. I said no; today I arrived very early. He smiled and said: That's good. After going home that evening, I told Mom about this small thing. Mom said life is made of many small habits.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我走得不快，但是心里不着急。
sentenceExplanations.en: I did not walk fast, but I was not anxious.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I did not walk fast, but I was not anxious.

grammar.label: Degree complement
grammar.explanationEn: The complement marker introduces a phrase that describes the degree or manner of an action. It answers how well, how quickly, or to what extent something is done.
grammar.exampleZh: 我走得不快，但是心里不着急。
grammar.exampleEn: I did not walk fast, but I was not anxious.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 到了图书馆以后，我给安娜打电话。
sentenceExplanations.en: After arriving at library, I called Anna.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: After arriving at library, I called Anna.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 安娜说她五分钟后到。
sentenceExplanations.en: Anna said she would arrive in five minutes.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: Anna said she would arrive in five minutes.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我在门口等她。
sentenceExplanations.en: I waited for her at the entrance.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I waited for her at the entrance.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 旁边有一家小店。
sentenceExplanations.en: There was a small shop nearby.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: There was a small shop nearby.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 店里卖水，也卖面包。
sentenceExplanations.en: The shop sold water and bread.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: The shop sold water and bread.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我买了一瓶水。
sentenceExplanations.en: I bought a bottle of water.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I bought a bottle of water.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 一共三块钱，不贵。
sentenceExplanations.en: It was three yuan in total, not expensive.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: It was three yuan in total, not expensive.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 安娜到了以后，我们一起进去。
sentenceExplanations.en: After Anna arrived, we went in together.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: After Anna arrived, we went in together.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我们先看了时间，然后开始做事。
sentenceExplanations.en: We first checked the time, then started working.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: We first checked the time, then started working.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 开始的时候，我觉得有点儿难。
sentenceExplanations.en: At the beginning, I felt it was a little difficult.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: At the beginning, I felt it was a little difficult.

grammar.label: Time frame
grammar.explanationEn: This time phrase follows an action, event, or time expression and sets the time frame for the main clause: “when …”.
grammar.exampleZh: 开始的时候，我觉得有点儿难。
grammar.exampleEn: At the beginning, I felt it was a little difficult.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 安娜帮我看了看，说问题不大。
sentenceExplanations.en: Anna looked it over for me and said the problem was not big.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: Anna looked it over for me and said the problem was not big.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 她说慢慢来，不要着急。
sentenceExplanations.en: She said to take it slowly and not worry.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: She said to take it slowly and not worry.

grammar.label: Negative instruction
grammar.explanationEn: This form placed before a verb tells someone not to do that action. It is the standard negative form for an instruction or request.
grammar.exampleZh: 她说慢慢来，不要着急。
grammar.exampleEn: She said to take it slowly and not worry.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 因为她说得很清楚，所以我很快明白了。
sentenceExplanations.en: Because she explained it clearly, I understood quickly.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: Because she explained it clearly, I understood quickly.

grammar.label: Reason and result
grammar.explanationEn: The first connector introduces the reason and the second introduces the result. Together they make the cause-and-effect relationship explicit.
grammar.exampleZh: 因为她说得很清楚，所以我很快明白了。
grammar.exampleEn: Because she explained it clearly, I understood quickly.

grammar.label: Degree complement
grammar.explanationEn: The complement marker introduces a phrase that describes the degree or manner of an action. It answers how well, how quickly, or to what extent something is done.
grammar.exampleZh: 因为她说得很清楚，所以我很快明白了。
grammar.exampleEn: Because she explained it clearly, I understood quickly.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 中午我们一起吃饭。
sentenceExplanations.en: At noon, we ate together.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: At noon, we ate together.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我点了米饭和青菜。
sentenceExplanations.en: I ordered rice and vegetables.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I ordered rice and vegetables.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 安娜点了一碗面。
sentenceExplanations.en: Anna ordered a bowl of noodles.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: Anna ordered a bowl of noodles.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 吃饭的时候，我们聊了很多。
sentenceExplanations.en: While eating, we talked a lot.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: While eating, we talked a lot.

grammar.label: Time frame
grammar.explanationEn: This time phrase follows an action, event, or time expression and sets the time frame for the main clause: “when …”.
grammar.exampleZh: 吃饭的时候，我们聊了很多。
grammar.exampleEn: While eating, we talked a lot.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 她说最近学习很忙。
sentenceExplanations.en: She said she had been busy studying recently.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: She said she had been busy studying recently.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我说我也一样。
sentenceExplanations.en: I said I was the same.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I said I was the same.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 下午我们又做了一个小时。
sentenceExplanations.en: In the afternoon, we worked for another hour.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: In the afternoon, we worked for another hour.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 事情做完以后，我觉得很舒服。
sentenceExplanations.en: After finishing the task, I felt comfortable.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: After finishing the task, I felt comfortable.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我发现，很多事情一个人做很慢，两个人做就快一点。
sentenceExplanations.en: I realized that many things are slow alone but a little faster with two people.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I realized that many things are slow alone but a little faster with two people.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 回家的时候，天开始下雨了。
sentenceExplanations.en: When I went home, it started raining.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: When I went home, it started raining.

grammar.label: Time frame
grammar.explanationEn: This time phrase follows an action, event, or time expression and sets the time frame for the main clause: “when …”.
grammar.exampleZh: 回家的时候，天开始下雨了。
grammar.exampleEn: When I went home, it started raining.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我没有带伞，只好坐车回家。
sentenceExplanations.en: I did not bring an umbrella, so I had to take a bus home.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I did not bring an umbrella, so I had to take a bus home.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 晚上妈妈问我今天怎么样。
sentenceExplanations.en: In the evening, Mom asked how my day was.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: In the evening, Mom asked how my day was.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我说今天有点儿累，但是很有意思。
sentenceExplanations.en: I said it was a little tiring but very interesting.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I said it was a little tiring but very interesting.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我还说，明天我想早点起床。
sentenceExplanations.en: I also said I wanted to get up earlier tomorrow.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I also said I wanted to get up earlier tomorrow.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 妈妈笑了，说这句话她已经听过很多次。
sentenceExplanations.en: Mom laughed and said she had heard that many times.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: Mom laughed and said she had heard that many times.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我也笑了。
sentenceExplanations.en: I laughed too.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I laughed too.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 可是这一次，我真的想试一试。
sentenceExplanations.en: But this time, I really want to try.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: But this time, I really want to try.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 写下来以后，心里安静了很多。
sentenceExplanations.en: After writing them down, my mind became much calmer.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: After writing them down, my mind became much calmer.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我发现，早一点出门不一定很难。
sentenceExplanations.en: I found that leaving a little earlier is not necessarily hard.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I found that leaving a little earlier is not necessarily hard.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 只是晚上要早点睡觉。
sentenceExplanations.en: You just have to sleep earlier at night.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: You just have to sleep earlier at night.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 中午的时候，我又见到了朋友。
sentenceExplanations.en: At noon, I saw my friend again.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: At noon, I saw my friend again.

grammar.label: Time frame
grammar.explanationEn: This time phrase follows an action, event, or time expression and sets the time frame for the main clause: “when …”.
grammar.exampleZh: 中午的时候，我又见到了朋友。
grammar.exampleEn: At noon, I saw my friend again.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 他问我今天有没有迟到。

sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: He asked whether I was late today.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我说没有，今天我到得很早。
sentenceExplanations.en: I said no; today I arrived very early.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I said no; today I arrived very early.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 他笑着说：这很好。
sentenceExplanations.en: He smiled and said: That's good.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: He smiled and said: That's good.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 晚上回家以后，我把这件小事告诉妈妈。
sentenceExplanations.en: After going home that evening, I told Mom about this small thing.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: After going home that evening, I told Mom about this small thing.

grammar.label: Disposing of an object
grammar.explanationEn: This construction brings a specific object before the verb to emphasize what is done with it and the resulting action or state.
grammar.exampleZh: 晚上回家以后，我把这件小事告诉妈妈。
grammar.exampleEn: After going home that evening, I told Mom about this small thing.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 妈妈说，生活就是很多小习惯。
sentenceExplanations.en: Mom said life is made of many small habits.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: Mom said life is made of many small habits.

summaryEn: An HSK 2 reading titled “Weekend plans”.
textZh:
今天的故事叫《周末的计划》。
早上我起床的时候，已经七点半了。
我觉得有点儿晚，所以很快洗脸，吃早饭。
妈妈问我今天要不要去饭店。
我说要去，因为我和老师有一个计划。
我把衣服放进书包里。
出门以前，我又看了一下手机。
天气不太好，可能会下雨。
如果下雨，我就坐公共汽车。
如果天气好，我就走路过去。
路上人很多，车也很多。
我走得不快，但是心里不着急。
到了饭店以后，我给老师打电话。
老师说他还有五分钟到。
我在门口等他。
旁边有一家小店。
店里卖水，也卖面包。
我买了一瓶水。
一共三块钱，不贵。
老师到了以后，我们一起进去。
我们先看了时间，然后开始做事。
开始的时候，我觉得有点儿难。
老师帮我看了看，说问题不大。
他说慢慢来，不要着急。
因为他说得很清楚，所以我很快明白了。
中午我们一起吃饭。
我点了米饭和青菜。
老师点了一碗面。
吃饭的时候，我们聊了很多。
他说最近学习很忙。
我说我也一样。
下午我们又做了一个小时。
事情做完以后，我觉得很舒服。
我发现，很多事情一个人做很慢，两个人做就快一点。
回家的时候，天开始下雨了。
我没有带伞，只好坐车回家。
晚上妈妈问我今天怎么样。
我说今天有点儿累，但是很有意思。
我还说，明天我想早点起床。
妈妈笑了，说这句话她已经听过很多次。
我也笑了。
可是这一次，我真的想试一试。
我发现，早一点出门不一定很难。
只是晚上要早点睡觉。
中午的时候，我又见到了朋友。
他问我今天有没有迟到。
我说没有，今天我到得很早。
他笑着说：这很好。
晚上回家以后，我把这件小事告诉妈妈。
妈妈说，生活就是很多小习惯。
我觉得她说得对。
从那以后，我想慢慢改变。
translation: Today's story is called 'Weekend plans'. When I got up in the morning, it was already seven thirty. I was running a little late, so I quickly washed my face and ate breakfast. Mom asked whether I needed to go to the restaurant today. I said yes, because the teacher and I had a plan. I put the clothes into my backpack. Before going out, I looked at my phone again. The weather was not very good; it might rain. If it rains, I will take the bus. If the weather is good, I will walk there. There were many people and many cars on the road. I did not walk fast, but I was not anxious. After arriving at restaurant, I called teacher. The teacher said he would arrive in five minutes. I waited for him at the door. There was a small shop nearby. The shop sold water and bread. I bought a bottle of water. It was three yuan in total, not expensive. After teacher arrived, we went in together. We first checked the time, then started working. At the beginning, I felt it was a little difficult. The teacher looked it over for me and said it was not a big problem. He said to take it slowly and not worry. Because he explained it clearly, I understood quickly. At noon, we ate together. I ordered rice and vegetables. The teacher ordered a bowl of noodles. While eating, we talked a lot. He said studying had been busy recently. I said I was the same. In the afternoon, we worked for another hour. After finishing the task, I felt comfortable. I realized that many things are slow alone but a little faster with two people. When I went home, it started raining. I did not bring an umbrella, so I had to take a bus home. In the evening, Mom asked how my day was. I said it was a little tiring but very interesting. I also said I wanted to get up earlier tomorrow. Mom laughed and said she had heard that many times. I laughed too. But this time, I really want to try. I found that leaving a little earlier is not necessarily hard. You just have to sleep earlier at night. At noon, I saw my friend again. He asked whether I was late today. I said no; today I arrived very early. He smiled and said: That's good. After going home that evening, I told Mom about this small thing. Mom said life is made of many small habits. I think what she said was right. From then on, I wanted to change slowly.
translationEn: Today's story is called 'Weekend plans'. When I got up in the morning, it was already seven thirty. I was running a little late, so I quickly washed my face and ate breakfast. Mom asked whether I needed to go to the restaurant today. I said yes, because the teacher and I had a plan. I put the clothes into my backpack. Before going out, I looked at my phone again. The weather was not very good; it might rain. If it rains, I will take the bus. If the weather is good, I will walk there. There were many people and many cars on the road. I did not walk fast, but I was not anxious. After arriving at restaurant, I called teacher. The teacher said he would arrive in five minutes. I waited for him at the door. There was a small shop nearby. The shop sold water and bread. I bought a bottle of water. It was three yuan in total, not expensive. After teacher arrived, we went in together. We first checked the time, then started working. At the beginning, I felt it was a little difficult. The teacher looked it over for me and said it was not a big problem. He said to take it slowly and not worry. Because he explained it clearly, I understood quickly. At noon, we ate together. I ordered rice and vegetables. The teacher ordered a bowl of noodles. While eating, we talked a lot. He said studying had been busy recently. I said I was the same. In the afternoon, we worked for another hour. After finishing the task, I felt comfortable. I realized that many things are slow alone but a little faster with two people. When I went home, it started raining. I did not bring an umbrella, so I had to take a bus home. In the evening, Mom asked how my day was. I said it was a little tiring but very interesting. I also said I wanted to get up earlier tomorrow. Mom laughed and said she had heard that many times. I laughed too. But this time, I really want to try. I found that leaving a little earlier is not necessarily hard. You just have to sleep earlier at night. At noon, I saw my friend again. He asked whether I was late today. I said no; today I arrived very early. He smiled and said: That's good. After going home that evening, I told Mom about this small thing. Mom said life is made of many small habits. I think what she said was right. From then on, I wanted to change slowly.

sentenceExplanations.en: Today's story is called 'Weekend plans'.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: Today's story is called 'Weekend plans'.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 早上我起床的时候，已经七点半了。
sentenceExplanations.en: When I got up in the morning, it was already seven thirty.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: When I got up in the morning, it was already seven thirty.

grammar.label: Time frame
grammar.explanationEn: This time phrase follows an action, event, or time expression and sets the time frame for the main clause: “when …”.
grammar.exampleZh: 早上我起床的时候，已经七点半了。
grammar.exampleEn: When I got up in the morning, it was already seven thirty.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我觉得有点儿晚，所以很快洗脸，吃早饭。
sentenceExplanations.en: I was running a little late, so I quickly washed my face and ate breakfast.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I was running a little late, so I quickly washed my face and ate breakfast.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 妈妈问我今天要不要去饭店。
sentenceExplanations.en: Mom asked whether I needed to go to the restaurant today.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: Mom asked whether I needed to go to the restaurant today.

grammar.label: Negative instruction
grammar.explanationEn: This form placed before a verb tells someone not to do that action. It is the standard negative form for an instruction or request.
grammar.exampleZh: 妈妈问我今天要不要去饭店。
grammar.exampleEn: Mom asked whether I needed to go to the restaurant today.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我说要去，因为我和老师有一个计划。
sentenceExplanations.en: I said yes, because the teacher and I had a plan.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I said yes, because the teacher and I had a plan.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我把衣服放进书包里。
sentenceExplanations.en: I put the clothes into my backpack.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I put the clothes into my backpack.

grammar.label: Disposing of an object
grammar.explanationEn: This construction brings a specific object before the verb to emphasize what is done with it and the resulting action or state.
grammar.exampleZh: 我把衣服放进书包里。
grammar.exampleEn: I put the clothes into my backpack.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 出门以前，我又看了一下手机。
sentenceExplanations.en: Before going out, I looked at my phone again.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: Before going out, I looked at my phone again.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 天气不太好，可能会下雨。
sentenceExplanations.en: The weather was not very good; it might rain.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: The weather was not very good; it might rain.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 如果下雨，我就坐公共汽车。
sentenceExplanations.en: If it rains, I will take the bus.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: If it rains, I will take the bus.

grammar.label: Condition and result
grammar.explanationEn: The first connector introduces a condition; the second marks what happens when that condition is met.
grammar.exampleZh: 如果下雨，我就坐公共汽车。
grammar.exampleEn: If it rains, I will take the bus.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 如果天气好，我就走路过去。
sentenceExplanations.en: If the weather is good, I will walk there.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: If the weather is good, I will walk there.

grammar.label: Condition and result
grammar.explanationEn: The first connector introduces a condition; the second marks what happens when that condition is met.
grammar.exampleZh: 如果天气好，我就走路过去。
grammar.exampleEn: If the weather is good, I will walk there.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 路上人很多，车也很多。
sentenceExplanations.en: There were many people and many cars on the road.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: There were many people and many cars on the road.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我走得不快，但是心里不着急。
sentenceExplanations.en: I did not walk fast, but I was not anxious.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I did not walk fast, but I was not anxious.

grammar.label: Degree complement
grammar.explanationEn: The complement marker introduces a phrase that describes the degree or manner of an action. It answers how well, how quickly, or to what extent something is done.
grammar.exampleZh: 我走得不快，但是心里不着急。
grammar.exampleEn: I did not walk fast, but I was not anxious.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 到了饭店以后，我给老师打电话。
sentenceExplanations.en: After arriving at restaurant, I called teacher.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: After arriving at restaurant, I called teacher.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 老师说他还有五分钟到。
sentenceExplanations.en: The teacher said he would arrive in five minutes.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: The teacher said he would arrive in five minutes.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我在门口等他。
sentenceExplanations.en: I waited for him at the door.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I waited for him at the door.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 旁边有一家小店。
sentenceExplanations.en: There was a small shop nearby.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: There was a small shop nearby.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 店里卖水，也卖面包。
sentenceExplanations.en: The shop sold water and bread.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: The shop sold water and bread.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我买了一瓶水。
sentenceExplanations.en: I bought a bottle of water.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I bought a bottle of water.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 一共三块钱，不贵。
sentenceExplanations.en: It was three yuan in total, not expensive.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: It was three yuan in total, not expensive.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 老师到了以后，我们一起进去。
sentenceExplanations.en: After teacher arrived, we went in together.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: After teacher arrived, we went in together.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我们先看了时间，然后开始做事。
sentenceExplanations.en: We first checked the time, then started working.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: We first checked the time, then started working.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 开始的时候，我觉得有点儿难。
sentenceExplanations.en: At the beginning, I felt it was a little difficult.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: At the beginning, I felt it was a little difficult.

grammar.label: Time frame
grammar.explanationEn: This time phrase follows an action, event, or time expression and sets the time frame for the main clause: “when …”.
grammar.exampleZh: 开始的时候，我觉得有点儿难。
grammar.exampleEn: At the beginning, I felt it was a little difficult.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 老师帮我看了看，说问题不大。
sentenceExplanations.en: The teacher looked it over for me and said it was not a big problem.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: The teacher looked it over for me and said it was not a big problem.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 他说慢慢来，不要着急。
sentenceExplanations.en: He said to take it slowly and not worry.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: He said to take it slowly and not worry.

grammar.label: Negative instruction
grammar.explanationEn: This form placed before a verb tells someone not to do that action. It is the standard negative form for an instruction or request.
grammar.exampleZh: 他说慢慢来，不要着急。
grammar.exampleEn: He said to take it slowly and not worry.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 因为他说得很清楚，所以我很快明白了。
sentenceExplanations.en: Because he explained it clearly, I understood quickly.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: Because he explained it clearly, I understood quickly.

grammar.label: Reason and result
grammar.explanationEn: The first connector introduces the reason and the second introduces the result. Together they make the cause-and-effect relationship explicit.
grammar.exampleZh: 因为他说得很清楚，所以我很快明白了。
grammar.exampleEn: Because he explained it clearly, I understood quickly.

grammar.label: Degree complement
grammar.explanationEn: The complement marker introduces a phrase that describes the degree or manner of an action. It answers how well, how quickly, or to what extent something is done.
grammar.exampleZh: 因为他说得很清楚，所以我很快明白了。
grammar.exampleEn: Because he explained it clearly, I understood quickly.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 中午我们一起吃饭。
sentenceExplanations.en: At noon, we ate together.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: At noon, we ate together.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我点了米饭和青菜。
sentenceExplanations.en: I ordered rice and vegetables.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I ordered rice and vegetables.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 老师点了一碗面。
sentenceExplanations.en: The teacher ordered a bowl of noodles.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: The teacher ordered a bowl of noodles.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 吃饭的时候，我们聊了很多。
sentenceExplanations.en: While eating, we talked a lot.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: While eating, we talked a lot.

grammar.label: Time frame
grammar.explanationEn: This time phrase follows an action, event, or time expression and sets the time frame for the main clause: “when …”.
grammar.exampleZh: 吃饭的时候，我们聊了很多。
grammar.exampleEn: While eating, we talked a lot.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 他说最近学习很忙。
sentenceExplanations.en: He said studying had been busy recently.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: He said studying had been busy recently.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我说我也一样。
sentenceExplanations.en: I said I was the same.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I said I was the same.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 下午我们又做了一个小时。
sentenceExplanations.en: In the afternoon, we worked for another hour.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: In the afternoon, we worked for another hour.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 事情做完以后，我觉得很舒服。
sentenceExplanations.en: After finishing the task, I felt comfortable.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: After finishing the task, I felt comfortable.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我发现，很多事情一个人做很慢，两个人做就快一点。
sentenceExplanations.en: I realized that many things are slow alone but a little faster with two people.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I realized that many things are slow alone but a little faster with two people.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 回家的时候，天开始下雨了。
sentenceExplanations.en: When I went home, it started raining.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: When I went home, it started raining.

grammar.label: Time frame
grammar.explanationEn: This time phrase follows an action, event, or time expression and sets the time frame for the main clause: “when …”.
grammar.exampleZh: 回家的时候，天开始下雨了。
grammar.exampleEn: When I went home, it started raining.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我没有带伞，只好坐车回家。
sentenceExplanations.en: I did not bring an umbrella, so I had to take a bus home.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I did not bring an umbrella, so I had to take a bus home.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 晚上妈妈问我今天怎么样。
sentenceExplanations.en: In the evening, Mom asked how my day was.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: In the evening, Mom asked how my day was.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我说今天有点儿累，但是很有意思。
sentenceExplanations.en: I said it was a little tiring but very interesting.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I said it was a little tiring but very interesting.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我还说，明天我想早点起床。
sentenceExplanations.en: I also said I wanted to get up earlier tomorrow.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I also said I wanted to get up earlier tomorrow.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 妈妈笑了，说这句话她已经听过很多次。
sentenceExplanations.en: Mom laughed and said she had heard that many times.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: Mom laughed and said she had heard that many times.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我也笑了。
sentenceExplanations.en: I laughed too.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I laughed too.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 可是这一次，我真的想试一试。
sentenceExplanations.en: But this time, I really want to try.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: But this time, I really want to try.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我发现，早一点出门不一定很难。
sentenceExplanations.en: I found that leaving a little earlier is not necessarily hard.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I found that leaving a little earlier is not necessarily hard.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 只是晚上要早点睡觉。
sentenceExplanations.en: You just have to sleep earlier at night.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: You just have to sleep earlier at night.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 中午的时候，我又见到了朋友。
sentenceExplanations.en: At noon, I saw my friend again.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: At noon, I saw my friend again.

grammar.label: Time frame
grammar.explanationEn: This time phrase follows an action, event, or time expression and sets the time frame for the main clause: “when …”.
grammar.exampleZh: 中午的时候，我又见到了朋友。
grammar.exampleEn: At noon, I saw my friend again.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 他问我今天有没有迟到。
sentenceExplanations.en: He asked whether I was late today.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: He asked whether I was late today.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我说没有，今天我到得很早。
sentenceExplanations.en: I said no; today I arrived very early.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I said no; today I arrived very early.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 他笑着说：这很好。
sentenceExplanations.en: He smiled and said: That's good.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: He smiled and said: That's good.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 晚上回家以后，我把这件小事告诉妈妈。
sentenceExplanations.en: After going home that evening, I told Mom about this small thing.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: After going home that evening, I told Mom about this small thing.

grammar.label: Disposing of an object
grammar.explanationEn: This construction brings a specific object before the verb to emphasize what is done with it and the resulting action or state.
grammar.exampleZh: 晚上回家以后，我把这件小事告诉妈妈。
grammar.exampleEn: After going home that evening, I told Mom about this small thing.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 妈妈说，生活就是很多小习惯。
sentenceExplanations.en: Mom said life is made of many small habits.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: Mom said life is made of many small habits.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我觉得她说得对。
sentenceExplanations.en: I think what she said was right.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I think what she said was right.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 从那以后，我想慢慢改变。
sentenceExplanations.en: From then on, I wanted to change slowly.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: From then on, I wanted to change slowly.

comprehensionQuestions.questionEn: What is the main topic of this reading?
comprehensionQuestions.answerEn: It mainly discusses weekend plans.
comprehensionQuestions.explanationEn: The title and repeated details point to the central topic.

comprehensionQuestions.questionEn: What is the writer's final thought?
comprehensionQuestions.answer: 从那以后，我想慢慢改变。
comprehensionQuestions.answerEn: From then on, I wanted to change slowly.
comprehensionQuestions.explanationEn: The final sentence usually gives the conclusion or reflection.

summaryEn: An HSK 2 reading titled “Looking for my phone”.
textZh:
今天的故事叫《找手机》。
早上我起床的时候，已经七点半了。
我觉得有点儿晚，所以很快洗脸，吃早饭。
妈妈问我今天要不要去地铁站。
我说要去，因为我和同学有一个计划。
我把杯子放进书包里。
出门以前，我又看了一下手机。
天气不太好，可能会下雨。
如果下雨，我就坐公共汽车。
如果天气好，我就走路过去。
路上人很多，车也很多。
我走得不快，但是心里不着急。
到了地铁站以后，我给同学打电话。
同学说他还有五分钟到。
我在门口等他。
旁边有一家小店。
店里卖水，也卖面包。
我买了一瓶水。
一共三块钱，不贵。
同学到了以后，我们一起进去。
我们先看了时间，然后开始做事。
开始的时候，我觉得有点儿难。
同学帮我看了看，说问题不大。
他说慢慢来，不要着急。
因为他说得很清楚，所以我很快明白了。
中午我们一起吃饭。
我点了米饭和青菜。
同学点了一碗面。
吃饭的时候，我们聊了很多。
他说最近学习很忙。
我说我也一样。
下午我们又做了一个小时。
事情做完以后，我觉得很舒服。
我发现，很多事情一个人做很慢，两个人做就快一点。
回家的时候，天开始下雨了。
我没有带伞，只好坐车回家。
晚上妈妈问我今天怎么样。
我说今天有点儿累，但是很有意思。
我还说，明天我想早点起床。
妈妈笑了，说这句话她已经听过很多次。
我也笑了。
可是这一次，我真的想试一试。
只是晚上要早点睡觉。
中午的时候，我又见到了朋友。
他问我今天有没有迟到。
我说没有，今天我到得很早。
他笑着说：这很好。
晚上回家以后，我把这件小事告诉妈妈。
妈妈说，生活就是很多小习惯。
我觉得她说得对。
从那以后，我想慢慢改变。
第二天早上，我真的早起了。
translation: Today's story is called 'Looking for my phone'. When I got up in the morning, it was already seven thirty. I was running a little late, so I quickly washed my face and ate breakfast. Mom asked whether I needed to go to the subway station today. I said yes, because my classmate and I had a plan. I put the cup into my backpack. Before going out, I looked at my phone again. The weather was not very good; it might rain. If it rains, I will take the bus. If the weather is good, I will walk there. There were many people and many cars on the road. I did not walk fast, but I was not anxious. After arriving at subway station, I called classmate. My classmate said he would arrive in five minutes. I waited for him at the door. There was a small shop nearby. The shop sold water and bread. I bought a bottle of water. It was three yuan in total, not expensive. After classmate arrived, we went in together. We first checked the time, then started working. At the beginning, I felt it was a little difficult. My classmate looked it over for me and said it was not a big problem. He said to take it slowly and not worry. Because he explained it clearly, I understood quickly. At noon, we ate together. I ordered rice and vegetables. My classmate ordered a bowl of noodles. While eating, we talked a lot. He said studying had been busy recently. I said I was the same. In the afternoon, we worked for another hour. After finishing the task, I felt comfortable. I realized that many things are slow alone but a little faster with two people. When I went home, it started raining. I did not bring an umbrella, so I had to take a bus home. In the evening, Mom asked how my day was. I said it was a little tiring but very interesting. I also said I wanted to get up earlier tomorrow. Mom laughed and said she had heard that many times. I laughed too. But this time, I really want to try. You just have to sleep earlier at night. At noon, I saw my friend again. He asked whether I was late today. I said no; today I arrived very early. He smiled and said: That's good. After going home that evening, I told Mom about this small thing. Mom said life is made of many small habits. I think what she said was right. From then on, I wanted to change slowly. The next morning, I really got up early.
translationEn: Today's story is called 'Looking for my phone'. When I got up in the morning, it was already seven thirty. I was running a little late, so I quickly washed my face and ate breakfast. Mom asked whether I needed to go to the subway station today. I said yes, because my classmate and I had a plan. I put the cup into my backpack. Before going out, I looked at my phone again. The weather was not very good; it might rain. If it rains, I will take the bus. If the weather is good, I will walk there. There were many people and many cars on the road. I did not walk fast, but I was not anxious. After arriving at subway station, I called classmate. My classmate said he would arrive in five minutes. I waited for him at the door. There was a small shop nearby. The shop sold water and bread. I bought a bottle of water. It was three yuan in total, not expensive. After classmate arrived, we went in together. We first checked the time, then started working. At the beginning, I felt it was a little difficult. My classmate looked it over for me and said it was not a big problem. He said to take it slowly and not worry. Because he explained it clearly, I understood quickly. At noon, we ate together. I ordered rice and vegetables. My classmate ordered a bowl of noodles. While eating, we talked a lot. He said studying had been busy recently. I said I was the same. In the afternoon, we worked for another hour. After finishing the task, I felt comfortable. I realized that many things are slow alone but a little faster with two people. When I went home, it started raining. I did not bring an umbrella, so I had to take a bus home. In the evening, Mom asked how my day was. I said it was a little tiring but very interesting. I also said I wanted to get up earlier tomorrow. Mom laughed and said she had heard that many times. I laughed too. But this time, I really want to try. You just have to sleep earlier at night. At noon, I saw my friend again. He asked whether I was late today. I said no; today I arrived very early. He smiled and said: That's good. After going home that evening, I told Mom about this small thing. Mom said life is made of many small habits. I think what she said was right. From then on, I wanted to change slowly. The next morning, I really got up early.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 同学点了一碗面。
paragraphTranslations.en: My classmate ordered a bowl of noodles.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 吃饭的时候，我们聊了很多。
paragraphTranslations.en: While eating, we talked a lot.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 他说最近学习很忙。
paragraphTranslations.en: He said studying had been busy recently.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 我说我也一样。
paragraphTranslations.en: I said I was the same.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 下午我们又做了一个小时。
paragraphTranslations.en: In the afternoon, we worked for another hour.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 事情做完以后，我觉得很舒服。
paragraphTranslations.en: After finishing the task, I felt comfortable.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 我发现，很多事情一个人做很慢，两个人做就快一点。
paragraphTranslations.en: I realized that many things are slow alone but a little faster with two people.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 回家的时候，天开始下雨了。
paragraphTranslations.en: When I went home, it started raining.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 我没有带伞，只好坐车回家。
paragraphTranslations.en: I did not bring an umbrella, so I had to take a bus home.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 晚上妈妈问我今天怎么样。
paragraphTranslations.en: In the evening, Mom asked how my day was.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 我说今天有点儿累，但是很有意思。
paragraphTranslations.en: I said it was a little tiring but very interesting.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 我还说，明天我想早点起床。
paragraphTranslations.en: I also said I wanted to get up earlier tomorrow.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 妈妈笑了，说这句话她已经听过很多次。
paragraphTranslations.en: Mom laughed and said she had heard that many times.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 我也笑了。
paragraphTranslations.en: I laughed too.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 可是这一次，我真的想试一试。
paragraphTranslations.en: But this time, I really want to try.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 只是晚上要早点睡觉。
paragraphTranslations.en: You just have to sleep earlier at night.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 中午的时候，我又见到了朋友。
paragraphTranslations.en: At noon, I saw my friend again.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 他问我今天有没有迟到。
paragraphTranslations.en: He asked whether I was late today.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 我说没有，今天我到得很早。
paragraphTranslations.en: I said no; today I arrived very early.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 他笑着说：这很好。
paragraphTranslations.en: He smiled and said: That's good.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 晚上回家以后，我把这件小事告诉妈妈。
paragraphTranslations.en: After going home that evening, I told Mom about this small thing.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 妈妈说，生活就是很多小习惯。
paragraphTranslations.en: Mom said life is made of many small habits.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 我觉得她说得对。
paragraphTranslations.en: I think what she said was right.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 从那以后，我想慢慢改变。
paragraphTranslations.en: From then on, I wanted to change slowly.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 第二天早上，我真的早起了。
paragraphTranslations.en: The next morning, I really got up early.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 今天的故事叫《找手机》。
sentenceExplanations.en: Today's story is called 'Looking for my phone'.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: Today's story is called 'Looking for my phone'.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 早上我起床的时候，已经七点半了。
sentenceExplanations.en: When I got up in the morning, it was already seven thirty.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: When I got up in the morning, it was already seven thirty.

grammar.label: Time frame
grammar.explanationEn: This time phrase follows an action, event, or time expression and sets the time frame for the main clause: “when …”.
grammar.exampleZh: 早上我起床的时候，已经七点半了。
grammar.exampleEn: When I got up in the morning, it was already seven thirty.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我觉得有点儿晚，所以很快洗脸，吃早饭。
sentenceExplanations.en: I was running a little late, so I quickly washed my face and ate breakfast.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I was running a little late, so I quickly washed my face and ate breakfast.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 妈妈问我今天要不要去地铁站。
sentenceExplanations.en: Mom asked whether I needed to go to the subway station today.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: Mom asked whether I needed to go to the subway station today.

grammar.label: Negative instruction
grammar.explanationEn: This form placed before a verb tells someone not to do that action. It is the standard negative form for an instruction or request.
grammar.exampleZh: 妈妈问我今天要不要去地铁站。
grammar.exampleEn: Mom asked whether I needed to go to the subway station today.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我说要去，因为我和同学有一个计划。
sentenceExplanations.en: I said yes, because my classmate and I had a plan.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I said yes, because my classmate and I had a plan.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我把杯子放进书包里。
sentenceExplanations.en: I put the cup into my backpack.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I put the cup into my backpack.

grammar.label: Disposing of an object
grammar.explanationEn: This construction brings a specific object before the verb to emphasize what is done with it and the resulting action or state.
grammar.exampleZh: 我把杯子放进书包里。
grammar.exampleEn: I put the cup into my backpack.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 出门以前，我又看了一下手机。
sentenceExplanations.en: Before going out, I looked at my phone again.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: Before going out, I looked at my phone again.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 天气不太好，可能会下雨。
sentenceExplanations.en: The weather was not very good; it might rain.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: The weather was not very good; it might rain.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 如果下雨，我就坐公共汽车。
sentenceExplanations.en: If it rains, I will take the bus.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: If it rains, I will take the bus.

grammar.label: Condition and result
grammar.explanationEn: The first connector introduces a condition; the second marks what happens when that condition is met.
grammar.exampleZh: 如果下雨，我就坐公共汽车。
grammar.exampleEn: If it rains, I will take the bus.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 如果天气好，我就走路过去。
sentenceExplanations.en: If the weather is good, I will walk there.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: If the weather is good, I will walk there.

grammar.label: Condition and result
grammar.explanationEn: The first connector introduces a condition; the second marks what happens when that condition is met.
grammar.exampleZh: 如果天气好，我就走路过去。
grammar.exampleEn: If the weather is good, I will walk there.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 路上人很多，车也很多。
sentenceExplanations.en: There were many people and many cars on the road.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: There were many people and many cars on the road.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我走得不快，但是心里不着急。
sentenceExplanations.en: I did not walk fast, but I was not anxious.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I did not walk fast, but I was not anxious.

grammar.label: Degree complement
grammar.explanationEn: The complement marker introduces a phrase that describes the degree or manner of an action. It answers how well, how quickly, or to what extent something is done.
grammar.exampleZh: 我走得不快，但是心里不着急。
grammar.exampleEn: I did not walk fast, but I was not anxious.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 到了地铁站以后，我给同学打电话。
sentenceExplanations.en: After arriving at subway station, I called classmate.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: After arriving at subway station, I called classmate.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 同学说他还有五分钟到。
sentenceExplanations.en: My classmate said he would arrive in five minutes.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: My classmate said he would arrive in five minutes.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我在门口等他。
sentenceExplanations.en: I waited for him at the door.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I waited for him at the door.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 旁边有一家小店。
sentenceExplanations.en: There was a small shop nearby.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: There was a small shop nearby.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 店里卖水，也卖面包。
sentenceExplanations.en: The shop sold water and bread.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: The shop sold water and bread.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我买了一瓶水。
sentenceExplanations.en: I bought a bottle of water.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I bought a bottle of water.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 一共三块钱，不贵。
sentenceExplanations.en: It was three yuan in total, not expensive.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: It was three yuan in total, not expensive.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 同学到了以后，我们一起进去。
sentenceExplanations.en: After classmate arrived, we went in together.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: After classmate arrived, we went in together.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我们先看了时间，然后开始做事。

sentenceExplanations.zh: 开始的时候，我觉得有点儿难。
sentenceExplanations.en: At the beginning, I felt it was a little difficult.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 同学帮我看了看，说问题不大。
sentenceExplanations.en: My classmate looked it over for me and said it was not a big problem.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: My classmate looked it over for me and said it was not a big problem.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 他说慢慢来，不要着急。
sentenceExplanations.en: He said to take it slowly and not worry.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: He said to take it slowly and not worry.

grammar.label: Negative instruction
grammar.explanationEn: This form placed before a verb tells someone not to do that action. It is the standard negative form for an instruction or request.
grammar.exampleZh: 他说慢慢来，不要着急。
grammar.exampleEn: He said to take it slowly and not worry.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 因为他说得很清楚，所以我很快明白了。
sentenceExplanations.en: Because he explained it clearly, I understood quickly.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: Because he explained it clearly, I understood quickly.

grammar.label: Reason and result
grammar.explanationEn: The first connector introduces the reason and the second introduces the result. Together they make the cause-and-effect relationship explicit.
grammar.exampleZh: 因为他说得很清楚，所以我很快明白了。
grammar.exampleEn: Because he explained it clearly, I understood quickly.

grammar.label: Degree complement

grammar.exampleZh: 因为他说得很清楚，所以我很快明白了。
grammar.exampleEn: Because he explained it clearly, I understood quickly.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 中午我们一起吃饭。
sentenceExplanations.en: At noon, we ate together.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: At noon, we ate together.

sentenceExplanations.zh: 我点了米饭和青菜。
sentenceExplanations.en: I ordered rice and vegetables.
sentenceExplanations.naturalMeaning: I ordered rice and vegetables.
